title: buxus koreana
intro: Buxus koreana, also known as Korean boxwood, is a type of evergreen shrub native to Korea and parts of China, characterized by its small leaves and compact growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Buxus koreana are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. In herbal preparations, Buxus koreana is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
